crashDetail.error: TypeError: synAnswer.toLowerCase is not a function
crashDetail.rootCause: Pools mens_wc_years and womens_wc_years contain numeric (integer) syntheticDistractors — e.g. 1926, 1942, 1993 — instead of strings. Runtime selectDistractors assumes string type and calls .toLowerCase() on them, crashing immediately.
crashDetail.recommendedFix: Coerce all syntheticDistractors entries in data/decks/fifa_world_cup.json to strings. Also add a verify-all-decks check: every syntheticDistractors entry must be typeof === "string".
